body:
### User Story
As a user of the portfolio website, I want to have high-quality, atmospheric retro-pixel art wallpapers to choose from so that the website feels more immersive and visually consistent.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 8 new dynamic retro-pixel art images created (inspired by the "Forest" wallpaper).
- [ ] Wallpapers added to `public/wallpapers`.
- [ ] `components/win95/WallpaperSelector.tsx` updated to reduce options to 9 total (Forest + 8 new).
- [ ] UI correctly displays and applies the new wallpapers.
- [ ] Old wallpaper assets (Win95 Teal color, Clouds, Red Blocks, Blue Rivets, Sandstone, Tiles, Triangles, Waves) removed from the selection list.

### Technical Notes
- The "Forest" wallpaper (`/wallpapers/forest.png`) should be kept as the baseline style.
- New images should be generated with high attention to detail in a pixel-art style.
- Implementation will involve editing `components/win95/WallpaperSelector.tsx` and adding files to `public/wallpapers/`.
title: [Feature]: Replace wallpaper selections with retro-pixel art
